title: Snowier Snow Layers!
description: Custom block model with modified textures for snow that wraps around blocks! It's also virtually seamless!
body:
This lightweight pack makes snow layers look snowier with a new block model and an overhanging side texture based on Minecraft's snowy dirt blocks.

This is something I've wanted to make for a while now and finally got around to doing it. I know other people have made similar resource packs before but I believe mine is better because overall it has less blockmodel Jank. It is virtually seamless! Try it out yourself!
Hope you like it, and let me know what you think!

Oh and Optifine is also NOT required for this texture pack!


### Terms & Conditions
- Feel free to use this in videos and such, just give me a shoutout or link back to this post in the description.
- You may include it in mod packs or use it on servers, just give credit when appropriate.
- Don't redistribute without my permission.
- I may adjust these terms and conditions at any time as needed.
